HiddenAdvancedConfiguration.Configuration:
/**
 * @param {Context} context
 * @description Sets the visibility of the field. The method must return true or false
*/
const SetVisibility = async (context) => {
    return context.Form.Page1.LeadStatus.Value == "Canceled" || 
    context.Form.Page1.EnrollmentStatus.Value == "Canceled" || 
    context.Form.Page1.AssessmentStatus.Value == "Canceled" || 
    context.Form.Page1.InstallationStatus.Value == "Canceled" ||
    context.Form.Page1.LeadStatus.Value == "Declined" || 
    context.Form.Page1.EnrollmentStatus.Value == "Declined" || 
    context.Form.Page1.AssessmentStatus.Value == "Declined" || 
    context.Form.Page1.InstallationStatus.Value == "Declined" ||
    context.Form.Page1.LeadStatus.Value == "Ineligible" || 
    context.Form.Page1.EnrollmentStatus.Value == "Ineligible" || 
    context.Form.Page1.AssessmentStatus.Value == "Ineligible" || 
    context.Form.Page1.InstallationStatus.Value == "Ineligible" ;
}
